case_title: EAH VS. CYRITA PACHECO et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EAH AS TO DEFENDANT PACHECO, CYRITA DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACHECO, CYRITA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 750 FONT BOULEVARD APT. #01-516-B2 S.F. CA. 94132, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
